# Cisco MIBs

Download from: https://mibs.cloudapps.cisco.com/ITDIT/MIBS/servlet/index

Required MIBs for full NetPulse support:
- `CISCO-SMI.my`
- `CISCO-TC.my`
- `CISCO-ENVMON-MIB.my` (temperature / fans / power)
- `CISCO-MEMORY-POOL-MIB.my`
- `CISCO-PROCESS-MIB.my`
- `CISCO-CDP-MIB.my`

Place downloaded files in this directory. They are not redistributed here due
to Cisco's licensing.
